card.title: AI settings
card.description: Turn each AI feature on separately and choose the OCR provider used for supplier invoices.
card.enableHint: When off, every AI surface short-circuits with a friendly notice.
card.providerHint: AWS Textract processes OCR today. Google Document AI and Azure Form Recognizer stay listed for configuration, but need credentials and provider wiring before production use.
card.providerLocked: Available after ENG-101 wires credentials and provider support.
card.modelHint: Leave blank to use the provider's default. Override when the provider publishes a newer model.
card.budgetHint: Calls refuse once this month's spend reaches the budget. Set to 0 to disable temporarily.
card.providerMissing: Provider not configured (check the required environment variable or local daemon)
card.transcribeAiDisabledHint: Turn on AI features before testing transcription.
card.transcribeProviderMissingHint: Configure the active provider before testing transcription.
card.transcribeUnavailableHint: Your provider doesn't support transcription. Switch to OpenAI in this card.
card.transcribePermissionHint: Microphone access was denied. Allow the mic in your browser settings and try again.
card.transcribeNoMicHint: No microphone detected. Plug one in and reload the page.
card.transcribeUnsupportedHint: Your browser doesn't support audio recording. Try the desktop app or a recent Chrome / Edge / Firefox / Safari.
